chants.title: One Nil to the Arsenal
chants.lyrics:
One nil to the Arsenal
One nil to the Arsenal
One nil to the Arsenal
One nil to the Arsenal
chants.tuneName: Go West (Pet Shop Boys / Village People)
chants.contextNotes: Sung when leading 1-0. One of the most recognisable Arsenal chants.

chants.title: 49 Undefeated
chants.lyrics:
Forty-nine, forty-nine undefeated
Forty-nine, forty-nine I say
Forty-nine, forty-nine undefeated
Playing football the Arsenal way

chants.title: Saka and Emile Smith Rowe
chants.lyrics:
And I like it,
I like it,
I like it,
I like it,
I la-la-like it,
La-la, like it,
Here we go, oh!
Saka and Emile Smith Rowe!
chants.contextNotes: Started when Saka and Smith Rowe broke through together. Still sung for Saka.

chants.title: Super Mik Arteta
chants.lyrics:
We've got Super Mik Arteta,
He knows exactly what we need;
Kieran at the back, Gabi in attack,
Arsenal on the way to Champions League!
chants.contextNotes: A tribute to manager Mikel Arteta.

chants.title: Gabriel, King of Brazil
chants.lyrics:
You'll fall in love, I know you will,
Our number 6 is the King of Brazil!
Our centre half, he'll give you hell,
Our wall at the back is Gabriel.
Ole, ole, ole, ola!
chants.tuneName: You'll Fall in Love, I Know You Will
chants.contextNotes: For Brazilian centre-back Gabriel Magalhaes, who wears number 6.

chants.title: Saliba
chants.lyrics:
Do do do do do do do do,
Do do do do do do,
Owowohhooo, SALIBA!
Do do do do do do do do,
Do do do do do do,
Owowohhooo, SALIBA!
chants.contextNotes: For defender William Saliba, sung to the riff from 'Tequila'.

chants.title: Kai Havertz Scores Again
chants.lyrics:
Tsamina mina, eh eh,
Waka waka, eh eh,
60 million down the drain,
Kai Havertz scores again!
chants.contextNotes: Set to Shakira's 'Waka Waka'. The 60 million line pokes fun at his transfer fee.

chants.title: 49 49 Lewis-Skelly
chants.lyrics:
49, 49, Lewis-Skelly,
49, 49, I say,
49, 49, Lewis-Skelly,
Playing football the Arsenal way!
chants.tuneName: Give Me Oil in My Lamp
chants.contextNotes: Adapted from the '49 Undefeated' chant; here the 49 is Myles Lewis-Skelly's shirt number.
